title: Responsive design - Core concepts - Tailwind CSS
body: Just like breakpoint variants, container queries are mobile-first in Tailwind CSS and apply at the target container size and up. Max-width container queries.

title: A Practical Guide to Container Queries
body: Dive into our container queries guide to enhance your responsive design skills. Make layouts adapt to their parent elements!

title: Best Practices for Building Mobile-First Responsive Websites.
body: Here’s a guide to best practices for crafting mobile-first responsive websites that captivate and convert. 1. Start with a Mobile-First Approach. Designing for smaller screens first forces you to focus on the essentials.

title: Tailwind Media Queries | Tailkits
body: Tailwind handles “media queries” with responsive variants like sm: and md: on a mobile-first base. In v4, customize breakpoints in CSS with @theme variables (e.g., --breakpoint-md: 48rem) and target ranges using patterns like md:max-lg
